title: Cobble Cove QOL Modpack
description: a Cobblemon Modpack for the CobbleCove Server that adds vanilla+ features into the game!
body:
**Cobble Cove is a modpack that aims to make playing on the CobbleCove server as easy as possible! You don't need to play on our server, this can be used on any server, or singleplayer cobblemon as well.** 

**❓Why should I play Cobble Cove?**

* 📋**Global Tasks** 
* 🥇Compete against other players in various categories for **rewards** in the daily, weekly, and monthly **Leaderboards**
* 📰**DAILY Challenges**
* 🧬**ALL Mega Evolutions!**
* 💰All of our Purchasable Perks and Ranks are also able to be bought in-game with our **free to earn** Gems Currency! 
* 💽**TMs** So you can customize your team!
* 📈Our economy is driven and powered by our Players, creating a** fun, community based experience.**
* 🎉**Plenty of fun things to do** and participate in like Tournaments, Build Competitions, Breeding, Raids, and more.
* ✅We have a **MAJORITY of the missing Cobblemon Models implemented** on our server!  
* 🫂**Friendly,** welcoming, **active,** and helpful community
* 🐻‍❄️**CUSTOM** Legendary Spawning System
* 🌉**Discord & Minecraft Chat Bridge** So you can always see what's going on

**Some of the mods our modpack adds:**

* [ResourcePackCached](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcepackcached) (No resource loading screen)
* [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/versions) (Optionally talk with other players & friends in voice-chat!)
* [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) (Minecraft rendering/other performance)
* [Great Scrollable Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-scrollable-tooltips) (Scroll tool tips top to bottom if they are too big to fit on the screen)
* [E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons]() (Cobblemon Icons on Xaero's Map)
* [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) (In-game map with many useful features)
* And many more! 

# Cobble Cove Server Information:
* Discord: https://discord.com/invite/NBZUV95whH
* Website: https://cobblecove.net
* Server IP: cobblecove.net
